routing_rule_summary: MASTER owns routing, approvals, governance, and next best step.
APP owns app surfaces and app-facing truth presentation.
DATA owns DB truth, schema, RLS, migrations, and upstream/source correctness.
AUTOMATION owns cron, jobs, webhooks, retries, and runtime health.
ENGINEERING HYGIENE owns low-risk cleanup without behavior change.
Domain chats own product implementation within their narrow domain.
Cross-scope work is split by MASTER into exact handoffs.
When next step remains in the same owner scope, continue directly without self-handoff.
